channel.title: hosts on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in hosts on IT notes

item.title: Ansible Patterns
item.description: To match hosts only starting with certain string a regex could be used for example to match hosts starting with the word fabrik: --- - hosts: ~fabrik.* become: True tasks: - name: uname shell: uname -a register: uname - debug: var: uname.stdout notice the ~
